name: minusfall
description: Minusfall - a falling-block puzzle where numbered rows clear by subtraction

scripts.build: echo 'No build step required — single HTML file'
scripts.android:debug: cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:bundle: cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ./gradlew bundleRelease
